title: Photos: Highlights from the St. Patrick’s Day Parade
author: Boston.com Staff
bullets: St. Patrick's Day Parade in South Boston started at Andrew Square on March 15, 2026.
Participants included Scott Poce from East Bridgewater with green eyebrows, and groups from Florida.
Boston authorities plan to enforce strict rules against public drinking during the parade.

title: 2 men arrested after fatal overdose on Cape Cod prompts monthslong, multi-town investigation
author: Darin Zullo
bullets: Two men, William Sarnie and Andre Silvia, arrested for drug trafficking after Cape Cod overdose investigation.
Sarnie and Silvia charged with conspiracy and trafficking 200 grams or more of cocaine in Barnstable Court.
Investigation involved multiple law enforcement agencies; search warrants executed in Nantucket and Wareham leading to arrests.

title: ‘SNL’ recap: Best moments from Harry Styles hosting ‘Saturday Night Live’
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: Harry Styles hosted and performed as the musical guest on 'Saturday Night Live' on March 14, 2026.
This was Styles' second time serving as both host and musical guest, having first done so in 2019.
Ryan Gosling made a cameo to introduce Styles' first musical performance, 'Dance No More.'

title: Former Boston Public Schools teacher sentenced to 10 years in prison for child exploitation
author: Darin Zullo
bullets: John Magee Gavin, a former Boston teacher, sentenced to 10 years for child exploitation involving online sexual conversations.
Gavin coerced minors through Discord, possessing 94 images and 53 videos of child sexual abuse material on his phone.
Gavin's victims, contacted through states like Florida and Texas, were as young as 5 to 17 years old.

title: 5 unsigned free agents that would be possible fits for Patriots
author: Colin McCarthy
bullets: New England Patriots seek additional free agents despite early signings like Romeo Doubs and Dre'Mont Jones.
Tyreek Hill could boost Patriots' receiving corps if legal and injury issues are resolved.
Linebacker Bobby Okereke could strengthen Patriots' defense after 143 tackles in 2025.

title: Neemias Queta dominates in Celtics win over Wizards: 7 takeaways
author: Colin McCarthy
bullets: Neemias Queta led the Celtics with 24 points and 10 rebounds in a 111-100 win over the Wizards.
Jayson Tatum scored 20 points but struggled from 3-point range, hitting only 2 of 9 attempts.
The Celtics face a busy week with upcoming games against the Suns, Warriors, Grizzlies, and Timberwolves.

title: Photos: Highlights from Dropkick Murphys’ St. Patrick’s Day kickoff at MGM Music Hall
author: Darin Zullo
bullets: Dropkick Murphys started their St. Patrick's Day weekend with a show at MGM Music Hall, Fenway, on March 13.
Openers included The Vigilantes, Haywire, and Showcase Showdown, with impactful performances at the March 13 event.
The show featured prominent performances by band members Ken Casey, Kevin Rheault, Jeff DaRosa, and Tim Brennan.

title: ‘Feisty I think is the word’: The Boston vs. New York rivalry arrives in NWSL for Legacy FC’s debut
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: Boston Legacy FC made its NWSL debut at Gillette Stadium with over 30,000 fans attending.
Gotham FC won 1-0 against Legacy FC in a match tying NWSL record with eight yellow cards.
Legacy FC's playing style was aggressive, with head coach Filipa Patão focusing on possession tactics.

title: Review and setlist: Dropkick Murphys fires up crowd, flames ICE at St. Paddy’s Day kickoff show
author: Darin Zullo
bullets: Dropkick Murphys performed at MGM Music Hall at Fenway on March 13 for St. Patrick's Day celebrations.
The band's set included a protest song "Citizen I.C.E." against U.S. Immigrations and Customs Enforcement.
Guest performances included Heather Fahey and Austin Sparkman on stage with Dropkick Murphys.

title: He’s running Boston to support people like him with Type 1 diabetes
author: Kelly Chan
bullets: Collin Bennett from New Braintree is running the Boston Marathon for Team Beth Israel Lahey Health.
Diagnosed with Type 1 diabetes at age 11, Bennett supports Joslin Diabetes Center's role in his life.
Bennett aims to raise awareness and funds for diabetes research and support through his marathon run.
